hero.headline: All your event memories, <rose>in one place</rose>
hero.subtitle: Share a QR code and your guests upload their photos instantly.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: 3 simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in under 2 minutes. No complex setup.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Name your event, add a cover photo and customize your album in seconds.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Guests scan the QR code or open the link. No apps, no sign-up needed.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Photos appear in real time. Download everything as a ZIP or share the album.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: No complications. No surprises.
features.noAppDesc: They just scan the QR or open the link. Works on any phone.
features.qualityDesc: Photos are saved without compression. Your memories at full resolution.
features.realtimeDesc: Photos appear instantly in the album. Everyone sees them at once.
features.privateDesc: Only those with the QR or link can access. You control who gets in.
features.zipDesc: One click and all photos are on your computer. No limits.
features.momentsDesc: Organize the album by moments (ceremony, dinner, dance…) linked to the itinerary.
features.aiDesc: Filters inappropriate content before it appears in the album.
features.slideshowDesc: Project the album on a screen and guests see their photos in real time.
features.qrDesc: Design the QR in your event colors to print or share digitally.

useCases.label: For any event
useCases.title: Made for everyone
useCases.weddingsDesc: The collaborative album all your guests can fill from the first dance to dessert.
useCases.birthdaysDesc: Save every toast and every laugh. Without missing a single photo.
useCases.corporateDesc: Team buildings, conferences and company dinners with a shared album.
useCases.partiesDesc: Attendees upload their best moments. The owner gets the complete album.
useCases.celebrationsDesc: Graduations, baptisms, reunions… Memories works for everything.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.t1Text: Our guests uploaded over 800 photos during the wedding. The next day we had everything organized by moment. Incredible.
testimonials.t2Text: We used it at our team building. In 2 minutes we had the QR and the whole team uploading photos. Nothing to install. We'll use it again.
testimonials.t3Text: Every night we project guests' photos on the club screen. People love it. Memories changed how we experience events.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Transparent, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Pay only if you want more.
pricing.disclaimer: Prices exclude VAT. One-time payment, no automatic renewal.
pricing.eventDesc: For your wedding. One payment, 6 months access.
pricing.proDesc: The full experience. Unlimited photos and customization.

finalCta.title: Create your first album in 2 minutes
finalCta.subtitle: No credit card. Free to start.

footer.tagline: Collaborative photo albums for any event. Share a QR and your guests upload their photos instantly.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Memories by Bodas de Hoy. All rights reserved.

meta.title: Memories — Collaborative photo albums for your event
meta.description: Share a QR code and your guests upload their photos instantly. No apps. No sign-up. For weddings, parties, birthdays and any event.

app.emptyDesc: Create your first album and start collecting your event memories.
app.loginDesc: Enter your email to access your albums.

album.shareDesc: Share this link or QR code with your guests so they can view and upload photos without signing up.
album.emptyDesc: Upload the first photos or share the QR with your guests.

public.nameDesc: Your name will appear next to the photos you upload.
public.emptyTitle: Be the first to upload a photo
public.emptyDesc: Tap the button above to start
public.invalidDesc: Album not found or link has expired.
